title: 3 Electric Utility Stocks With Safe Dividends Even in Severe Recessions

title: Evergy: Bearish Earnings Growth And Weak Technicals Outweigh A Decent P/E
text: The Utilities sector rallied versus the broad market as the USD moved higher during much of this year. Recently, however, the "utes" have struggled.
